examples: In some extend, I am not a hypercritical person about food.
The father was hypercritical of his eldest son in order to make him tough.
He's as big a geek as Zuckerberg, but of a different type: the hypercritical, even sometimes nasty type.
From newswires to investor-relations services and document parsers, a handful of enterprising young and old firms see today's hypercritical, hyper-regulatory environment as an opportunity for growth.
Our culture has become so crazed about body size and food intake, that it feels almost normal to be anxious about eating and hypercritical of the bodies we inhabit.
